# Phase 3 (P4) - Tree Detail Extended E2E Tests

**Generated by:** BMad QA Workflow
**Date:** 2026-03-30
**Status:** Planning

---

## 🎯 Goal

Generate comprehensive E2E tests for Tree Detail Extended features, expanding coverage of Tree Tracking flow from 60% to 95%.

---

## 📋 Test Cases (8-10 tests)

### File: `tree-detail-extended.spec.ts`

#### Section 1: Map & Location (2 tests)
1. **User views tree GPS location on map**
   - Navigate to order detail at `/crm/my-garden/[orderId]`
   - Verify map section displays with GPS coordinates
   - Check satellite/terrain view toggle works
   - Mock Google Maps API if needed

2. **Map displays multiple tree locations for multi-tree orders**
   - Navigate to order with multiple trees (quantity > 1)
   - Verify all tree markers appear on map
   - Test zoom controls and marker clustering

#### Section 2: Camera & Live Stream (2 tests)
3. **User views farm camera section**
   - Navigate to camera section in order detail
   - Verify camera stream placeholder or live feed displays
   - Check for camera unavailable state handling

4. **User switches between multiple farm cameras**
   - If multiple cameras available, test camera selector
   - Verify smooth transition between camera feeds
   - Test fullscreen mode if available

#### Section 3: Photo Gallery (2 tests)
5. **User browses tree growth photo gallery**
   - Navigate to photos section
   - Verify photo grid displays with timestamps
   - Test photo sorting (chronological, by milestone)
   - Test lightbox/modal on photo click

6. **User filters photos by growth phase**
   - Test filter controls (planting, sprout, growth, mature)
   - Verify filtered results update correctly
   - Test "show all" reset filter

#### Section 4: Timeline & Events (2 tests)
7. **User views tree timeline with key events**
   - Navigate to timeline section
   - Verify events display chronologically:
     - Planting date
     - First watering
     - Growth milestones (6 months, 1 year, etc.)
     - Harvest decision deadline
   - Test timeline zoom/pan controls

8. **User clicks timeline event for detail popup**
   - Click on timeline event marker
   - Verify popup shows event details (date, description, photos)
   - Test close popup action

#### Section 5: Reports & Downloads (2 tests)
9. **User views quarterly report section**
   - Navigate to reports section
   - Verify list of available reports (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4)
   - Check report generation status (ready, pending, unavailable)

10. **User downloads quarterly PDF report**
   - Click download button for available report
   - Mock PDF download API response
   - Verify download triggers (check download event or save dialog)
   - Validate PDF filename format: `report-Q1-2024-[orderId].pdf`

---

## 🔧 Implementation Strategy

### Pattern Reference
- Base on `my-garden-dashboard.spec.ts` for login flow and order navigation
- Use API mocking pattern from `identity-form.spec.ts` for external services
- Follow screenshot pattern from admin tests

### API Mocking Requirements
```typescript
// Mock Google Maps API
await page.route('**/maps.googleapis.com/**', route => route.fulfill({
    contentType: 'application/json',
    body: JSON.stringify({ status: 'OK', results: [] })
}))

// Mock camera stream endpoint
await page.route('**/api/camera/stream/**', route => route.fulfill({
    contentType: 'application/json',
    body: JSON.stringify({ streamUrl: 'https://example.com/stream.m3u8' })
}))

// Mock photo gallery API
await page.route('**/api/orders/*/photos', route => route.fulfill({
    contentType: 'application/json',
    body: JSON.stringify({
        photos: [
            { id: 1, url: '/photo1.jpg', timestamp: '2024-01-15', phase: 'planting' },
            { id: 2, url: '/photo2.jpg', timestamp: '2024-04-15', phase: 'growth' }
        ]
    })
}))

// Mock timeline events API
await page.route('**/api/orders/*/timeline', route => route.fulfill({
    contentType: 'application/json',
    body: JSON.stringify({
        events: [
            { id: 1, date: '2024-01-10', type: 'planting', description: 'Trồng cây' },
            { id: 2, date: '2024-01-15', type: 'watering', description: 'Tưới nước lần đầu' }
        ]
    })
}))

// Mock report download API
await page.route('**/api/orders/*/reports/**', route => route.fulfill({
    status: 200,
    contentType: 'application/pdf',
    body: Buffer.from('fake-pdf-content')
}))
```

### Test Data Requirements
- Order with `status = 'planted'` (trees in ground)
- Order must have:
  - GPS coordinates set
  - At least 2 photos in gallery
  - At least 3 timeline events
  - At least 1 quarterly report generated

### Helper Functions
```typescript
// Reuse from my-garden-dashboard.spec.ts
async function loginWithOTP(page: any)
async function getOTPFromMailpit(email: string)

// New helpers
async function navigateToOrderDetail(page: any, orderId: string)
async function waitForMapLoad(page: any)
async function mockPhotoGalleryAPI(page: any, photos: any[])
```

## 📊 Success Criteria

- ✅ 8-10 tests created
- ✅ All tests follow existing patterns (login, mocking, screenshots)
- ✅ 100% pass rate on first run
- ✅ Proper error handling for unavailable features
- ✅ Vietnamese locators and text matching
- ✅ Total execution time < 5 minutes
